before_code:
instance instFunLikeHeckeRing (P : HeckePair G) (Z : Type*) [Zero Z] :
    FunLike (𝕋 P Z) (HeckeCoset P) Z := inferInstanceAs (FunLike (HeckeCoset P →₀ Z) (HeckeCoset P) Z)
after_code:
instance (P : HeckePair G) (Z : Type*) [Zero Z] :
    FunLike (𝕋 P Z) (HeckeCoset P) Z := inferInstanceAs (FunLike (HeckeCoset P →₀ Z) (HeckeCoset P) Z)
description: Do not give instances explicit names unless they are referenced by name elsewhere (e.g. combined in a later `{ SomeInstance with ... }` extension, or targeted by an attribute/@[...] that needs the name). Lean auto-generates a name for every instance; mathlib convention is to leave them anonymous by default. Instances found only by typeclass resolution (FunLike, DecidableEq, Fintype, Mul, forwarding AddComm* instances) should stay anonymous. /cleanup should strip unnecessary instance names.
